## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests written/updated
- [ ] PHPStan + ECS + Rector passing locally (`make quality`)
- [ ] No new `@phpstan-ignore` without justification
- [ ] User-facing strings externalized (i18n)
- [ ] Migrations included (if DB changes)
